debug_info.goal:
f g : ℝ → ℝ
h₀ : ∀ (x y : ℝ), f (x + y) + f (x - y) = 2 * f x * g y
h₁ : ¬∀ (x : ℝ), f x = 0
h₂ : ∀ (x : ℝ), |f x| ≤ 1
⊢ ∀ (x : ℝ), |g x| ≤ 1

failed_attempts:
let S := Set.range (fun x ↦ |f x|)
  have h_bdd : BddAbove S := ⟨1, by rintro _ ⟨x, rfl⟩; exact h₂ x⟩
  have h_ne : S.Nonempty := Set.range_nonempty _
  let M := sSup S
  have hM_pos : 0 < M := by
    push_neg at h₁; obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := h₁
    exact lt_of_lt_of_le (abs_pos.mpr hx) (le_csSup h_bdd (Set.mem_range_self x))
  intro y
  by_contra hg
  push_neg at hg
  have h_le : M ≤ M / |g y| := by
    apply csSup_le h_ne
    rintro _ ⟨x, rfl⟩
    rw [le_div_iff' (lt_trans zero_lt_one hg)]
    have := abs_add (f (x + y)) (f (x - y))
    rw [h₀, abs_mul, abs_mul] at this
    norm_num at this
    have h_bound : |f (x + y)| + |f (x - y)| ≤ 2 * M :=
      add_le_add (le_csSup h_bdd (Set.mem_range_self _)) (le_csSup h_bdd (Set.mem_range_self _))
    linarith
  rw [le_div_iff' (lt_trans zero_lt_one hg)] at h_le
  exact not_le_of_lt hg (by nlinarith [h_le, hM_pos])

let S := Set.range (abs ∘ f)
  have hS_bdd : BddAbove S := ⟨1, by rintro _ ⟨x, rfl⟩; exact h₂ x⟩
  have hS_ne : S.Nonempty := Set.range_nonempty _
  let M := sSup S
  have hM_le : ∀ x, |f x| ≤ M := fun x ↦ le_csSup hS_bdd (Set.mem_range_self x)
  have hM_pos : 0 < M := by
    push_neg at h₁; rcases h₁ with ⟨x, hx⟩
    exact lt_of_lt_of_le (abs_pos.mpr hx) (hM_le x)
  intro y
  by_cases hg : g y = 0
  · simp [hg]
  · have : M * |g y| ≤ M := by
      rw [← le_div_iff' (abs_pos.mpr hg)]
      apply csSup_le hS_ne
      rintro _ ⟨x, rfl⟩
      rw [le_div_iff' (abs_pos.mpr hg), mul_comm]
      calc |f x| * |g y| = |2 * f x * g y| / 2 := by
             rw [abs_mul, abs_mul, abs_of_pos (two_pos : 0 < (2 : ℝ))]; field_simp
        _ = |f (x + y) + f (x - y)| / 2 := by rw [← h₀]
        _ ≤ M := by
             have := abs_add (f (x + y)) (f (x - y))
             have h₁ := hM_le (x + y)
             have h₂ := hM_le (x - y)
             linarith
    exact (mul_le_iff_le_one_left hM_pos).mp this

intro y
  by_contra hg
  push_neg at hg
  let S := Set.range fun x ↦ |f x|
  have hS_bdd : BddAbove S := ⟨1, by rintro _ ⟨x, rfl⟩; exact h₂ x⟩
  have hS_non : S.Nonempty := ⟨|f 0|, Set.mem_range_self 0⟩
  let M := sSup S
  have hM : ∀ x, |f x| ≤ M := fun x ↦ le_csSup hS_bdd (Set.mem_range_self x)
  have hM_pos : 0 < M := by

    exact lt_of_lt_of_le (abs_pos.mpr hx) (hM x)

    have : |2 * f x * g y| ≤ 2 * M :=

    rw [abs_mul, abs_mul, abs_two, mul_assoc] at this
    rw [mul_le_mul_left (by norm_num : (0:ℝ)<2)] at this
    rwa [le_div_iff' (lt_trans (by norm_num) hg)]
  rw [le_div_iff' (lt_trans (by norm_num) hg)] at this
  exact (lt_self_iff_false M).mp (lt_of_le_of_lt this (mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left hg hM_pos))

intro y
  let S := sSup (Set.range fun x ↦ |f x|)
  have h_bdd : BddAbove (Set.range fun x ↦ |f x|) :=
    ⟨1, by rintro _ ⟨x, rfl⟩; exact h₂ x⟩
  have h_ne : (Set.range fun x ↦ |f x|).Nonempty := ⟨|f 0|, Set.mem_range_self 0⟩
  have h_le_S : ∀ x, |f x| ≤ S := fun x ↦ le_csSup h_bdd (Set.mem_range_self x)
  have h_ineq : ∀ x, |f x| * |g y| ≤ S := by
    intro x
    have : |2 * f x * g y| ≤ |f (x + y)| + |f (x - y)| := by
      rw [← h₀ x y]; exact abs_add _ _
    rw [abs_mul, abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) ≤ 2)] at this
    linarith [h_le_S (x + y), h_le_S (x - y)]
  by_contra hg
  push_neg at hg
  have hS_pos : 0 < S := by
    push_neg at h₁; obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := h₁
    exact lt_of_lt_of_le (abs_pos.mpr hx) (h_le_S x)
  have : ∀ x, |f x| ≤ S / |g y| := fun x ↦
    (le_div_iff' (lt_trans zero_lt_one hg)).mpr (h_ineq x)
  have : S ≤ S / |g y| := csSup_le h_ne (by rintro _ ⟨x, rfl⟩; exact this x)
  rw [le_div_iff' (lt_trans zero_lt_one hg), mul_comm] at this
  exact absurd ((mul_le_mul_left hS_pos).mp this) (not_le.mpr hg)

by_contra h
  push_neg at h
  rcases h with ⟨y, hy⟩
  let S := Set.range (fun x ↦ |f x|)
  have bdd : BddAbove S := ⟨1, by rintro _ ⟨x, rfl⟩; exact h₂ x⟩
  have nonemp : S.Nonempty := ⟨|f 0|, Set.mem_range_self 0⟩
  let M := sSup S
  have M_pos : 0 < M := by
    by_contra h_neg
    apply h₁
    intro x
    apply abs_eq_zero.mp
    exact le_antisymm ((le_csSup bdd (Set.mem_range_self x)).trans (not_lt.mp h_neg)) (abs_nonneg _)
  have : M ≤ M / |g y| := csSup_le nonemp (by
    rintro _ ⟨x, rfl⟩
    rw [le_div_iff' (lt_trans zero_lt_one hy)]
    calc |f x| * |g y|
      _ = |2 * f x * g y| / 2 := by rw [abs_mul, abs_mul]; norm_num; ring
      _ = |f (x + y) + f (x - y)| / 2 := by rw [h₀]
      _ ≤ (|f (x + y)| + |f (x - y)|) / 2 := by
        apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_right (abs_add _ _) (by norm_num)
      _ ≤ (M + M) / 2 := by
        apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_right _ (by norm_num)
        exact add_le_add (le_csSup bdd (Set.mem_range_self _)) (le_csSup bdd (Set.mem_range_self _))
      _ = M := by ring)
  rw [div_le_iff (lt_trans zero_lt_one hy), ← mul_one M] at this
  exact not_le.mpr hy ((mul_le_mul_left M_pos).mp this)

      _ = M := by ring

        _ = |f (x + y) + f (x - y)| := by rw [h₀]
        _ ≤ |f (x + y)| + |f (x - y)| := abs_add _ _
        _ ≤ M + M := add_le_add (le_csSup hS_bdd ⟨x + y, rfl⟩) (le_csSup hS_bdd ⟨x - y, rfl⟩)
        _ = 2 * M := by ring
      linarith
    have : M ≤ M / |g y| := csSup_le hS_ne (fun z ⟨x, rfl⟩ ↦ (le_div_iff (abs_pos.mpr hgy)).mpr (h_le x))
    rwa [le_div_iff (abs_pos.mpr hgy), mul_comm, mul_le_iff_le_one_right hM_pos] at this
